label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7

extraction.one_line_summary: STORER Michael attacked from 29-rider breakaway on final climb with 14-16% ramps, distanced SIVAKOV Pavel and VERONA Carlos to take solo DSM victory
tactical_patterns: DSM placed three riders in early breakaway, allowing STORER Michael to skip pulls while BARDET Romain worked, perfect energy conservation.
MOVISTAR initiated selection in peloton before GROßSCHARTNER failed to take red by only 8 seconds, revealing conservative Jumbo-Visma pacing.
SIVAKOV Pavel's chain drop on attack neutralized Ineos Grenadiers' strongest breakaway card, gifting DSM the numerical advantage.
VERONA Carlos bridged late to front group but lacked final climb punch, showing chase efforts cost too much on 16% ramps.

rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: Executed textbook energy management by refusing breakaway pulls while teammate worked, then delivered dominant solo climb
rider_signals.GROßSCHARTNER Felix: positive: Missed red jersey by 8 seconds from breakaway, proving he's undervalued GC threat worth monitoring
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: Mechanical at worst moment neutralized strong breakaway position, but was fading anyway suggesting poor form
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Led favorites group home looking strongest of GC contenders, now only 1:22 down and emerging threat
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Explicitly in trouble on stage with moderate climbing, major red flag for remaining mountain stages
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: negative: Faded badly from 29-rider break despite early positioning, suggests serious form deficit
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: Crashed out with shoulder injury when MOVISTAR attacked, eliminating their road captain and Worlds preparation
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Retained red but TRENTIN's infernal pace barely contained break to 5 minutes, showing team vulnerability to numbers
rider_signals.POLANC Jan: negative: Held virtual lead throughout day from break but completely faded on final climb, poor climber selection exposed
